theme_notes: Taglines riff on Trump declaring the Iran war in its 'final stages,' PSG vs Arsenal in the Champions League final (Budapest, May 30), the SpaceX Starship trillion-dollar IPO run-up, Tulsi Gabbard's resignation as DNI, the WHO's Ebola global emergency in Congo, and the DOJ's charges against Raúl Castro.
settled: Congrats. Your finances are more stable than Tulsi Gabbard's career.
Balanced. Like the Champions League final — anyone could still win.
Almost zero. Like Trump's 'final stages' promise — close enough to believe.
youOwe: The Starship IPO will make $40 irrelevant. Not you, though.
Less than a Champions League beer. At Budapest prices.
Even the WHO isn't issuing an emergency over this. Yet.
One Gabbard press conference worth of drama. Pay up.
Enough for Ebola response supplies. You chose nachos instead.
The SpaceX IPO will mint billionaires. You can't clear $150.
Trump says the Iran war is in 'final stages.' Your debt said the same last March.
Enough for a flight to Budapest to watch PSG defend without you.
The WHO declared an emergency. Your partner has also filed paperwork.
The US charged Raúl Castro. You're next if you don't pay.
Starship's going to orbit. Your debt has its own escape velocity now.
PSG is defending Champions. You're defending a $700 bar tab.
Starship's testing for a trillion-dollar IPO. You're testing patience.
The Ebola containment zone has better boundaries than your finances.
PSG gets €20m for winning. Your partner gets nothing for putting up with you.
The Iran war has a ceasefire proposal. You don't.
Raúl Castro is 95 and facing charges. You're younger and facing worse.
Starship's valued at a trillion. You're the only thing going down.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a match program in Budapest. Collect anyway.
The Champions League final is decided. This, somehow, isn't.
They owe you less than a Gabbard press release costs the taxpayer.
Starship souvenir money. Claim it before the IPO makes them insufferable.
Enough to buy one Ebola precaution kit. Wear it to dinner.
PSG is worth €4bn. Your partner owes you $120. They're building toward something.
Enough to fly to Budapest. Make them come to you with cash instead.
The Iran war is almost over, Trump says. This debt is younger and healthier.
Gabbard quit the cabinet. You've got grounds too.
The WHO escalated Congo to a global emergency. Escalate this too.
Starship's about to make Musk richer. You're about to make a scene.
Trump charged a foreign head of state. You can charge your partner.
Arsenal made the Champions League final and might still lose. You won't.
The US paused Taiwan's arms deal. Don't pause this collection.
The Ebola emergency has a containment strategy. Make one.
Raúl Castro is the most wanted man in the hemisphere. Your partner is second.
Starship hasn't launched and you're already owed more than its fuel costs.
Trump's Iran 'final stages' lasted months. Yours had better not.
